zh.lifeSummary: 當Graf Antoine de Vaudémont於1401年8月2日出生在法國洛萊姆斯布拉班吉素-斯時，他的父親Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont32歲，母親Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont47歲。他於1416年8月12日與Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale在法國洛萊莫瑟勒結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1458年3月22日在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒瓦德艾蒙特享年56歲，埋葬在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Graf Antoine de Vaudémont于1401年8月2日出生在法国洛萊姆斯布拉班吉素-斯时，他的父亲Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont32岁，母亲Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont47岁。他于1416年8月12日与Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale在法国洛萊莫瑟勒结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1458年3月22日在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒瓦德艾蒙特享年56岁，埋葬在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Antoine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Anthony  , now also used in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Antwan
meanings: equivalent of   Anthony  , now also used in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Anthony
meanings: The usual English form of the old Roman family name Antonius, which is of uncertain (probably Etruscan) origin. The spelling with -th- (not normally reflected in the pronunciation) represents a learned but erroneous attempt to associate it with Greek anthos ‘flower’. In the post-classical period it was a common name, borne by various early saints, most notably a 3rd-century Egyptian hermit monk, who is regarded as the founder of Christian monasticism.

en.lifeSummary: When Graf Antoine de Vaudémont was born on 2 August 1401, in Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, France, his father, Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont, was 32 and his mother, Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont, was 47. He married Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale on 12 August 1416, in Moselle, Lorraine, France. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 22 March 1458, in Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, at the age of 56, and was buried in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Graf Antoine de Vaudémont est né le 2 août 1401, à Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, France, son père, Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale le 12 août 1416, à Moselle, Lorraine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 22 mars 1458, à Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Graf Antoine de Vaudémont am 2. August 1401 in Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont 32 und seine Mutter Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont 47. Er hat am 12. August 1416 in Mosel, Lothringen, Frankreich Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 22. März 1458 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich und wurde in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Antoine de Vaudémont è nato il il 2 agosto 1401 nel Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale il 12 agosto 1416, nel Moselle, Lorraine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 22 marzo 1458, nel Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Graf Antoine de Vaudémontが1401年8月2日にフランスロレィヌメウゼブラバント-スル-メウゼで生まれた時，父Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémontは32歳，母Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemontは47歳であった。1416年8月12日にフランスロレィヌモセルでMarie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1458年3月22日にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルヴァウドeモントで56歳で死去し，フランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルナンシにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Graf Antoine de Vaudémont(이)가 1401년 8월 2일 프랑스 로레이인 우스 브라반트-수-우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont(은)는 47세였다. 그는 1416년 8월 12일 프랑스 로레이인 모셀에서 Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1458년 3월 22일 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 바드e몽에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 난시에 묻혔다.

mn.2 August 1401–22 March 1458: 1401 оны Наймдугаар сарын 2–1458 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 22

pt.2 August 1401–22 March 1458: 2 de agosto de 1401–22 de março de 1458
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Antoine de Vaudémont nasceu em 2 de agosto de 1401, em Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale em 12 de agosto de 1416, em Moselle, Lorraine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de março de 1458, em Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Graf Antoine de Vaudémont родился 2 августа 1401 г. в местности брабант-сур-меус, меус, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale 12 августа 1416 г. в местности моселл, лорреаин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 22 марта 1458 г. в местности ваудeмонт, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности нанси, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция.

sm.du 1417 au 1458: mai le 1417 e o'o I le 1458

es.2 August 1401–22 March 1458: 2 de agosto de 1401–22 de marzo de 1458
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Graf Antoine de Vaudémont nació el 2 de agosto de 1401, en Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale el 12 de agosto de 1416, en Moselle, Lorraine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 22 de marzo de 1458, en Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia.
